message:
chore: add .claude/ to gitignore for Claude Code IDE config

The .claude/ directory contains local IDE configuration generated by
Claude Code sessions and should not be tracked in version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,3 +81,6 @@ ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
 test_logs/
+
+# Claude Code IDE config
+.claude/
